title: Post-workout Bitter Egyptian Feta Wrap
description: A post-workout Egyptian dish featuring cubed feta cheese, bitter greens, and creamy tahini sauce wrapped in a lotus leaf. Perfect for a refreshing and nutritious meal after a workout.
instructions: Soak the lotus leaf wrap in water for 5 minutes to make it pliable.
In a large bowl, combine the cubed feta cheese, brined mustard greens, lemon juice, garlic, salt, and black pepper. Mix well to combine.
Add the chopped fresh parsley, chopped fresh mint, and red pepper flakes (if using) to the bowl and mix again.
Brush the lotus leaf wrap with olive oil and place it on a flat surface.
Spread the feta and mustard green mixture evenly over the center of the lotus leaf wrap.
Drizzle the tahini sauce over the top of the feta and mustard green mixture.
Fold the ends of the lotus leaf wrap over the filling and then roll the wrap into a neat cylinder.
Repeat the process to make 4-6 wraps, depending on the size of your lotus leaf wraps.
